description: A global seafood conglomerate is evaluating three candidate coastal sites in the Southern Hemisphere for a new Atlantic Salmon aquaculture operation. Using the site evaluation brief at ~/Desktop/aquaculture_site_evaluation.txt and the NOAA sea surface temperature climatology data in ~/PanoplyData/sst.ltm.1991-2020.nc, complete a thermal stress assessment. Export seasonal SST maps and extract peak summer (February) temperatures at the coordinates specified in the brief to classify the biological viability of each site based on salmon thermal thresholds. Save all deliverables to ~/Documents/Aquaculture/.
